hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qi 'iPhone 16\|name=iPhone 16\|OS=18.5'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"WRONG SIMULATOR. Use iPhone 17 on iOS 26.4. Never use iPhone 16."}'; fi
